description: Wild Blood Patch 1 (6 November 2023) — Tracking Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Frost Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Shapeshifters, Helmets, Armors, Shoes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Tracking Changes
items: All additional creatures which drop Silver have been removed; every Tracking target will now drop rare ingredients with a chance of artifacts

In red zones, loot from Tracking is protected for the Tracking party if they engage in combat; if they did not engage, loot is protected for whoever kills the tracked creature; PvP-flagged players can still claim loot
Sylvian shield applied to allies during a channeling phase now removes all effects when either the shield breaks or the ally suffers a forced movement effect
Werewolf's bleed now ends when the fight ends
sections.searchable_text: Tracking Silver removed rare ingredients artifacts red zones loot protection combat PvP-flagged Sylvian shield channeling forced movement Werewolf bleed fight ends

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Consumables (food / potions) can now be equipped without triggering spell cooldowns
[Desktop] Moving mouse away from game window now closes active tooltips
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Consumables food potions equipped spell cooldowns Desktop mouse window tooltips

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Frost Staffs Frost Beam Quarterstaffs Separator Shapeshifters Prowling Staff Sinister Swipes Pounce Invisibility Passive Lightcaller Judgment Helmets Avalonian Beam Cowl of Purity Howl Mercenary Hood Armors Mend Wounds Purging Shield Mage Robe Shoes Ethereal Form Feyscale Sandals Raging Blink Stalker Shoes

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Separator Knockback Distance 12m fixed Root 2.5s 2.2s Damage 75 125

changes.raw_text: Separator: Knockback Distance: 12m (fixed distance); Root: 2.5s → 2.2s; Damage: 75 → 125
notes: Knockback Distance is now a fixed 12m

subsections.heading: Shapeshifters
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifters Energy Regeneration Factor 6 4.5 Sinister Swipes Prowling Staff Base Damage 120 90 true damage third hit Pounce Cooldown 10s 12s Invisibility Passive Panther clearer Judgment Lightcaller interruptible Hit Delay 1s 1.2s Damage 370 350 spell indication

changes.raw_text: Sinister Swipes: Base Damage: 120 → 90 (Note: the true damage element of the third hit remains unchanged)
notes: The true damage element of the third hit remains unchanged

changes.raw_text: Invisibility Passive: Panther invisibility warning effect is now clearer
notes: Panther invisibility warning effect is now clearer

changes.raw_text: Judgment (Lightcaller): The cast is now interruptible; Hit Delay: 1s → 1.2s; Damage: 370 → 350; Added a spell indication area for the hit delay
notes: Added a spell indication area for the hit delay

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Avalonian Beam Cowl of Purity Range 22m 18m Howl Mercenary Hood Attack Speed Reduction damage 30% 4s Damage 20.48 62 Slow Duration 5s 4s

changes.raw_text: Howl: Instead of Attack Speed Reduction, now reduces enemy damage by 30% for 4s; Damage: 20.48 → 62; Slow Duration: 5s → 4s
notes: Instead of Attack Speed Reduction, now reduces enemy damage by 30% for 4s

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Mend Wounds all Armors channel interrupted taking damage Purging Shield Mage Robe Cooldown 40s 35s Resistances 0.28 0.3

changes.raw_text: Mend Wounds: The channel is now interrupted when taking damage
notes: The channel is now interrupted when taking damage

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Ethereal Form Feyscale Sandals Cooldown 30s 45s Transformation Delay 1s 1.5s Raging Blink Stalker Shoes recast 4s Range 10m 7m Damage Healing Cast Increase per Blink 15% 8% stacks 2 Duration 4s 4.5s

changes.raw_text: Raging Blink: The ability can now be recast within 4s; Range: 10m → 7m; Damage and Healing Cast Increase per Blink: 15% → 8% (stacks up to 2 times now); Damage and Healing Cast Increase Duration: 4s → 4.5s
notes: The ability can now be recast within 4s
Now stacks up to 2 times (was unlimited before)

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where it was possible to bypass anonymity in Mists via 'Crafted by' and Awakened Weapons info
Guild Islands can now be abandoned again
Fixed issue where PvP-flagging would not be canceled by pressing the flagging button again
Fixed issue where cursor appearance only updated after mousing over an interactable object
Fixed issue where Smart Cluster Queue UI would disappear momentarily when closing world map or Destiny Board

Various UI fixes: guild activities editable in Recruitment settings; Marketplace Quick Sell UI improvements; nurture bonus icon; Hideout chest logs accessible; Gold Market UI movement fix; Shapeshifter Artifacts category; T3 Prowling Staff specialization display
Deadly Swipe (Daggers): Fixed issue where it would not apply multiple stacks when hitting multiple enemies
Fixed issue where Protection of the Fiends (Demon Armor) could be interrupted
[Mobile] Fixed issue where some mount skins displayed incorrectly
Fixed issue where nonlethal 20v20 Crystal League matches awarded Might
All book chests now contain at least one Tome of Insight
Fixed issue where different tiers of Sticky Potions could stack damage debuffs
Gate Cores in Avalonian Dungeons are now attackable by all weapon types
Additional graphical, UI, terrain, audio, VFX, and localization fixes
